description.zh: 变分自编码器把神经网络与概率潜变量建模结合起来。它的编码器、解码器和重参数化技巧让可扩展生成式建模可以通过梯度下降实现。
description.en: The variational autoencoder joined neural networks with probabilistic latent-variable modeling. Its encoder, decoder, and reparameterization trick made scalable generative modeling possible with gradient descent.

role.zh: 变分自编码器共同作者

notes.zh: 由 legacy generated milestone 批量迁移，展示层默认 preserve-legacy，需后续人工细化 claims 与来源绑定。
notes.en: Batch migrated from generated legacy milestone; presentation defaults to preserve-legacy, with claims and source bindings needing later review.
